# Symbols intentionally removed from HOLOGRAM. CI fails if any of these
# reappear in the codebase (excluding this file and history).
#
# Format: one entry per non-comment line, either
#   <symbol>                                   (searched repo-wide)
#   <symbol>::<glob-relative-to-repo-root>     (searched only in the matching paths)
#
# Add a comment above each entry explaining WHY it was removed, so a
# future contributor or AI agent understands the decision before
# attempting to "fix" the failing CI by re-adding it.

# QueryKey / query_key — XSWD RPC that returned the wallet's 25-word
# mnemonic seed under a persistent sign_transaction grant. Removed in
# 6b2935f; full key compromise risk via any approved dApp. The
# legitimate in-app GetSeedPhrase(password) path remains the only way
# to surface the seed. Discussed and rejected for consumer software in
# Dec 2025 with Azylem before HOLOGRAM existed; snuck back in via
# upstream walletapi-style scaffolding and was removed again Jun 2026.
QueryKey
query_key
